task.title: Copying a remote file from one subproject to another subproject

titlealts.navtitle: Copying a remote file from one subproject to another subproject

task.shortdesc: You can copy a partitioned data set member or sequential data set from one subproject to another.

taskbody.prereq: remote fileCopyingfrom one subproject to another subprojectYou must first be connected to the MVS system.

step.cmd: Select the partitioned data set member or data set you want to copy.

step.stepresult: A window opens showing a list of subprojects.
